name: test-improvements
title: Test concision + review-local fixture speedup
description: Collapse the 16-file per-module _support import shim to one import; parametrize repeated assertion blocks with subTest; class-scope the make_repo fixture in test_review_local (27 rebuilds -> build-once + copy). Tests-only, no bump; 100% installer coverage held; honest runtime measurement.
